vehicles.slot: Slot at base of gear selector housing or column selector — pry/slide cover to expose
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
This vehicle uses a COLUMN-MOUNTED shifter — the shift lock slot is on the STEERING COLUMN, not the floor console.
Locate the slot on the steering column — Slot at base of gear selector housing or column selector — pry/slide cover to expose.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot on the column.
Press firmly while pressing the brake pedal.
Move the column shifter to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery is under the rear seat — but use the jump terminals UNDER THE HOOD to connect your jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and move column shifter to N normally.
vehicles.notes: 4MATIC AWD: flatbed. AMG DCT: power preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. 4MATIC AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.

battery.location: In trunk (most generations) or under rear seat
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt on strut tower (−)
battery.warnings: Use hood terminals ONLY. Never jump directly at the trunk battery. AGM jump pack required.

vehicles.slot: Slot near console or column selector base
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
This vehicle uses a COLUMN-MOUNTED shifter — the shift lock slot is on the STEERING COLUMN, not the floor console.
Locate the slot on the steering column — Slot near console or column selector base.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot on the column.
Press firmly while pressing the brake pedal.
Move the column shifter to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery is under the rear seat — but use the jump terminals UNDER THE HOOD to connect your jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and move column shifter to N normally.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. 4MATIC AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.

battery.location: In trunk (most) or under rear seat
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Use hood terminals only. AGM jump pack.

vehicles.slot: Column selector (W220) or console selector (W221+) — slot at selector base
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
This vehicle uses a COLUMN-MOUNTED shifter — the shift lock slot is on the STEERING COLUMN, not the floor console.
Locate the slot on the steering column — Column selector (W220) or console selector (W221+) — slot at selector base.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot on the column.
Press firmly while pressing the brake pedal.
Move the column shifter to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery is under the rear seat — but use the jump terminals UNDER THE HOOD to connect your jump pack. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and move column shifter to N normally.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. 4MATIC AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.
AIR SUSPENSION: May lower/raise unexpectedly. Verify ride height is stable before loading on flatbed. Some models have a 'jack mode' or 'transport mode' — check with owner if possible.

knownIssues.title: Air Suspension Drops Without Power
knownIssues.detail: Airmatic air suspension lowers to the bump stops when the vehicle loses power. This makes flatbed loading very difficult. Restore 12V power first if at all possible. On W220/W221, the suspension can be manually raised using a dealer tool if power cannot be restored.

knownIssues.title: Battery Location Varies
knownIssues.detail: Battery is under the rear seat on some generations, in the trunk on others. Do not assume under-hood location.

battery.location: Under rear seat (W220/W221) or in trunk (W222/W223)
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Air suspension drops with power loss. Use hood terminals only. AGM jump pack.

shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: Slot near console selector base.
Pry off the cap or cover if present using your ignition key or a small flathead.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood or in cargo area — varies by model. Use an AGM-compatible jump pack — this vehicle has an AGM battery.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
If power cannot be restored, use the shift lock slot above — Slot near console selector base.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED ONLY — 4MATIC AWD is full-time, cannot be disabled. If no flatbed available, use wheel-lift with dollies on free-rolling axle.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.
FULL-TIME AWD: Cannot disengage AWD. Flatbed is the safest method. If using wheel-lift, dollies MUST be used on the free-rolling axle to prevent driveline damage.
AIR SUSPENSION: May lower/raise unexpectedly. Verify ride height is stable before loading on flatbed. Some models have a 'jack mode' or 'transport mode' — check with owner if possible.

knownIssues.title: Full-Time 4MATIC AWD — Flatbed Only
knownIssues.detail: 4MATIC AWD is full-time with no 2WD mode on most GLC/GLE/GLS trims. These vehicles CANNOT be wheel-lifted without dollies. FLATBED is the standard and correct method for all 4MATIC vehicles.

knownIssues.title: Air Suspension on E-Class and Above Trims
knownIssues.detail: Higher trim GLE and GLS models may have AIRMATIC air suspension that drops without power. Check and restore power if possible before loading.

battery.location: Under hood or in cargo area — varies by model
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood: red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: 4MATIC AWD — flatbed only. Use hood terminals. AGM jump pack.

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector — slot near selector base
shift: Turn the Mercedes-Benz EQC / EQE / EQS / EQA / EQB (Electric) to ON/Ready mode.
Shift lock slot: Electronic selector — slot near selector base.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot and press firmly.
Press the brake pedal while holding the slot.
Move selector to N.
FLATBED ONLY — do not tow with driven wheels on the ground.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — Varies by model — check owner's manual for 12V auxiliary location. 12V AUXILIARY BATTERY ONLY — never touch the high-voltage battery pack.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
FLATBED ONLY.
vehicles.notes: Do NOT touch the high-voltage system.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. Never tow with driven wheels on ground.
towNotes: ELECTRIC VEHICLE: FLATBED ONLY — never tow with any driven wheels on the ground. Regenerative braking system can damage motor/inverter.
If vehicle must be moved short distance without flatbed, use dollies under ALL driven wheels.
12V battery ONLY for jumping — NEVER touch or access the high-voltage (HV) system. HV components are marked with ORANGE cables/covers.

knownIssues.title: FLATBED ONLY — Electric Drivetrain
knownIssues.detail: All EQ-series Mercedes are electric. Towing with wheels on ground will damage motors. No exceptions.

knownIssues.title: 800V System on EQS/EQE
knownIssues.detail: EQS and EQE use an 800V architecture. Extreme hazard — never probe or touch any HV components. 12V terminals only.

battery.location: Varies by model — check owner's manual for 12V auxiliary location
battery.jumpTerminals: 12V auxiliary terminals only — location varies by model
battery.warnings: 800V HV on EQS/EQE. NEVER touch HV components. 12V auxiliary only. Flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: Slot near selector or column shifter base
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
This vehicle uses a COLUMN-MOUNTED shifter — the shift lock slot is on the STEERING COLUMN, not the floor console.
Locate the slot on the steering column — Slot near selector or column shifter base.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot on the column.
Press firmly while pressing the brake pedal.
Move the column shifter to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood, passenger side.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and move column shifter to N normally.
vehicles.notes: Large commercial van. Gas and diesel: same.
vehicles.warn: Large van — heavy wheel blocks required.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: HEAVY VEHICLE: Use properly rated wheel blocks, straps, and chains. Verify your equipment weight rating before attempting to load or lift.
DIESEL: Same shift-lock and tow procedures as gasoline variant. Heavier curb weight — account for extra weight in equipment ratings.

battery.warnings: Large commercial van. Heavy wheel blocks required.

vehicles.slot: Column-mounted shifter — slot at base of column selector
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
W202 C-Class uses a COLUMN-MOUNTED selector — shift lock slot is at the STEERING COLUMN base.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the column slot and press firmly.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move the column selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery is in the TRUNK on W202. Use hood jump terminals.
Connect AGM-compatible jump pack to hood terminals only.
Once powered, press brake and shift normally.
RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. 4MATIC AWD: flatbed only.
vehicles.notes: Column shifter. Battery in trunk — use hood terminals.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. 4MATIC AWD: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: Column shifter. Battery in trunk — use hood terminals.
RWD: lift from rear. 4MATIC: flatbed.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: Use hood terminals. AGM jump pack. 4MATIC: flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: Column-mounted selector — slot at column base; or console shift on some trims
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
W210 E-Class uses a COLUMN-MOUNTED selector on most trims.
Slot is at the STEERING COLUMN base — insert key and press firmly.
While holding, press brake. Move column selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery in trunk on W210 — use hood jump terminals (red fused + / black ground bolt −).
AGM-compatible jump pack required.
Once powered, shift normally.
RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. 4MATIC AWD: flatbed only.
vehicles.notes: Column shifter on most trims. Battery in trunk — use hood terminals.
vehicles.warn: 4MATIC AWD: flatbed only. W210 is notorious for electrical issues.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. 4MATIC: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: Column shifter. Battery in trunk — use hood terminals.
RWD: lift from rear. 4MATIC: flatbed.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — red fused terminal (+), black ground bolt (−)
battery.warnings: AGM jump pack. Use hood terminals only. 4MATIC: flatbed.

knownIssues.title: W210 Electrical Issues
knownIssues.detail: The W210 E-Class is notorious for electrical problems including corroded battery connections, failed brake light switches causing shift lock issues, and wiring harness failures. If the normal shift override doesn't work, check fuses and brake light switch before assuming solenoid failure.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood (W163/W164) or in the TRUNK (some W166).
W163/W164: battery under hood, driver side.
W166 (2012-2019): battery may be in the trunk — check both locations.
Once powered, shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: W166 battery location: some models have battery in trunk. Always verify. Flatbed preferred — full-time 4MATIC.
vehicles.warn: Permanent 4MATIC AWD — flatbed preferred. W166: battery may be in trunk.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED PREFERRED — permanent 4MATIC AWD. Wheel-lift with dollies if no flatbed.
towNotes: Permanent 4MATIC AWD — cannot disengage. Flatbed is safest.
Wheel-lift with dollies on free-rolling axle if flatbed unavailable.

battery.location: Under hood driver side (W163/W164); trunk possible on W166 — check both
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard terminals; W166: may be trunk
battery.warnings: W166: verify battery location — may be in trunk.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — BATTERY IS IN THE TRUNK.
CLK battery is in the trunk — do NOT look under the hood.
Open the trunk and connect jump pack directly to battery.
Once powered, shift to Neutral.
vehicles.notes: Battery in TRUNK on most CLK variants. RWD coupe/convertible.
vehicles.warn: Battery in TRUNK — not under the hood.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear. Flatbed preferred for convertible.
towNotes: RWD: lift from rear.
Battery in TRUNK — open trunk for jump access.

knownIssues.title: Battery in Trunk
knownIssues.detail: The CLK 12V battery is typically in the trunk. There is no battery under the hood. Open the trunk to access.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
R129: battery under hood.
R230/R231: battery in the TRUNK — open trunk for access.
Connect jump pack. Once powered, shift to Neutral.
Very high-value vehicle — flatbed strongly preferred.
vehicles.notes: Battery location: R129 (1990-2002) under hood. R230/R231: in TRUNK. Very high-value.
vehicles.warn: R230/R231: battery in TRUNK. Very high-value — flatbed ONLY.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear. Flatbed strongly preferred for all generations.
towNotes: RWD: lift from rear.
Very high-value vehicle — flatbed strongly preferred.
Battery location varies by generation — R230/R231 battery is in TRUNK.

knownIssues.title: Battery in Trunk (R230/R231)
knownIssues.detail: The R230 (2003-2012) and R231 (2013-2022) SL-Class have the 12V battery in the trunk. The R129 (1990-2002) has the battery under the hood.

battery.jumpTerminals: Varies by generation — R129 under hood, R230/R231 trunk
battery.warnings: Very high-value vehicle. R230/R231: battery in trunk.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — battery location varies.
R170 (1997-2004): battery under hood.
R171/R172 (2005-2020): battery in the TRUNK.
Once powered, shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: Battery location varies: R170 under hood; R171/R172 in TRUNK. Low clearance — flatbed preferred.
vehicles.warn: R171/R172: battery in TRUNK. Low clearance — flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear. Flatbed preferred due to low clearance.
towNotes: RWD: lift from rear.
R171/R172 battery in TRUNK.
Low clearance on all generations — use flatbed with ramps when available.

knownIssues.title: Battery in Trunk (R171/R172)
knownIssues.detail: The R171 (2005-2011) and R172 (2012-2020) SLK/SLC have the 12V battery in the trunk. R170 has it under the hood.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to Neutral normally.
Transfer case must be in High mode for road towing.
VERY IMPORTANT: all 3 differential locks MUST be disengaged before road towing.
vehicles.notes: Full-time 4WD with front, center, and rear locking diffs. ALL THREE LOCKS must be OFF before road towing. Never tow with diff locks engaged.
vehicles.warn: ALL 3 DIFF LOCKS MUST BE DISENGAGED BEFORE TOWING. Locking diffs on dry pavement will destroy the drivetrain.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED STRONGLY PREFERRED. If wheel-lift: TC in High, all diff locks OFF, dollies on free-rolling axle.

tc.type: Manual floor lever (low/high) plus 3 separate differential lock buttons on dash
positions: High — standard road mode — required for road towing
Low — low range — NEVER tow on road in low range
steps: Ensure all THREE differential locks are disengaged (center, front, rear locks all OFF).
TC floor lever must be in High range.
If wheel-lift: dollies REQUIRED on free-rolling axle.
IF BATTERY IS DEAD: Jump battery first. VERIFY diff locks are off before moving vehicle.

towNotes: CRITICAL: Three differential locks MUST ALL be disengaged before road towing.
Full-time 4WD — flatbed is safest.
NEVER tow with any differential lock engaged — will destroy the drivetrain on pavement.

knownIssues.title: 3 Differential Locks MUST Be Disengaged
knownIssues.detail: The G-Class has three lockable differentials: center, front, and rear. ALL THREE must be disengaged before road towing. If any lock is engaged while towing on dry pavement, severe driveline damage will occur. Check the dash indicator lights and confirm all three diff lock indicators are OFF.

battery.warnings: 2019+ uses AGM battery. ALL diff locks must be OFF before road towing.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console or stalk-style selector
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base or stalk selector.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector to Neutral.
DCT models: power preferred — restore 12V first if possible.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
DCT: restore 12V power before shifting — strongly preferred.
Once powered, shift to Neutral normally.
AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.notes: DCT on most trims: power preferred. AWD (4MATIC): flatbed preferred.
vehicles.warn: DCT: restore power before shifting. AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front. AWD: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front.
AWD (4MATIC): flatbed preferred.
DCT: restore 12V power before attempting shift.

battery.warnings: AGM battery — use AGM-compatible jump pack. DCT: restore power before shifting.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base or stalk-type selector on column
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Column/stalk-style selector: rotate the stalk or use the slot near the selector base.
Locate the shift lock release slot.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: Cargo/passenger van. Common commercial vehicle. RWD.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air.
towNotes: RWD: lift from rear. Commercial vehicle.

battery.warnings: AGM battery — use AGM-compatible jump pack.
